name: Iwọn AVPU
description: Igbelewọn aiji ipele 4 iyara. Yiyara ju GCS fun ipin akọkọ.
instructions: Ṣe ayẹwo ipele ti o ga julọ ti idahun ti alaisan ṣe afihan.

scoring.label: Itaniji
scoring.description: Alaisan wa ni asitun, mọ, ati idahun ni deede

scoring.label: Ohùn
scoring.description: Alaisan dahun nikan si iyanju ọrọ

scoring.label: Irora
scoring.description: Alaisan dahun nikan si awọn iyanju irora (sternal rub, titẹ ibusun àlàfo)

scoring.label: Aigbagbọ
scoring.description: Ko si esi si eyikeyi awọn akikanju -- ilowosi oju-ofurufu lẹsẹkẹsẹ nilo

interpretation.triage: Lominu ni --ọ̀nà atẹgun ninu ewu, GCS ni deede <= 8
Lẹsẹkẹsẹ -- ṣakoso ọna atẹgun ni bayi
